sections.heading: New Features
items: In-app Changelog screen — browse every past update from Settings → About
Premium plans: Weekly, Monthly, Annual subscriptions
Watch 5 short ads for 24-hour ad-free access
Speed Test screen with real-time speedometer
Ping Test with jitter and packet loss stats

sections.heading: Bug Fixes
items: App Usage now correctly shows all installed apps, not just system apps
Foreground/Background data split now reports accurate values
Fixed double-navigation bug when opening app details
Fixed ads not disappearing immediately after purchasing Premium

sections.heading: What's New
items: Real-time speed indicator in the status bar
Daily data and Wi-Fi usage notifications
